text.title: system-design-process Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for system-design-process as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generating C4 diagrams without a repo structure reference.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs invent components based on training data patterns; the resulting diagram describes a fictional system, not the actual one.

failure-mode.description: Merging the Validate phase into the Design phase as a closing paragraph.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The same persona that designed the system cannot adversarially attack it; the critic role requires a separate prompt with explicit failure-finding instructions.
